task: Write comprehensive adversarial test suite for reconcile() function, covering the gap.missing specification

keyFiles.reason: reconcile() function implementation to test against

acceptance: Test suite has 8+ tests covering core contract and boundary cases
Core contract tests fail on wrong implementation, pass on correct
Boundary tests validate regression guards (unchanged behavior)
All tests pass against current implementation
notes: Gap semantics: missing = bn.consumes.filter(c => !fn.produces.includes(c)). This captures unmet demand only (not surplus produces). See tests/adv-orient.test.ts for pattern.
